text.title: video-gen-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for video-gen-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Attempting to read or stream video content inline in an agent response.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Video files are binary and large. Download to disk first; pass the file path to ffprobe/ffmpeg for processing.
